articles.title: India launches E85 petrol that is ‘Rs 20 cheaper per liter’ – Availability, composition and other details
articles.description: The E85 fuel blend contains 80% to 85% ethanol and 14% to 19% petrol.

articles.title: Half of owners of older petrol vehicles want E0 or E10 fuel back, survey finds
articles.description: More than half of owners of petrol vehicles manufactured before 2023 want the option to switch back to E0 or E10 fuel, according to a LocalCircles survey. The study found that many vehicle owners have faced higher fuel and repair costs since the nationwide rollout of E20 petrol.

articles.title: 2026 Tata Tiago First Drive Review: More Than Just a Cosmetic Makeover?
articles.description: The refreshed Tiago gets a sharper design, a completely new cabin and a longer equipment list. But after driving both the petrol and CNG versions, does it feel significantly better behind the wheel?

articles.title: Can Your Car Run on E85 Fuel? Government Clears the Air Amid Viral Claims
articles.description: The government has launched E85 fuel, which has triggered confusion. Here's why regular E20 and petrol vehicles won't be affected and who can actually use E85.

articles.title: 2026 Renault Duster 1.0 Turbo Mileage Revealed: Here's What It Delivers
articles.description: The Renault Duster with a 1.0-litre turbo petrol engine with manual transmission is the most fuel-efficient powertrain of the SUV.

articles.title: HMRC confirms 26p per mile charges for these petrol drivers from June

articles.title: Govt cuts petrol price by Rs4 per litre, diesel unchanged
articles.description: ISLAMABAD  -  The federal government on Friday slashed petrol price by Rs4 per litre for 4th time in a row, while diesel price remains unchanged.

articles.title: RBI measures may draw $50 billion inflows, but inflation risks keep rate hikes on the table: Report
articles.description: ICICI Bank says RBI measures could bring USD 75 billion in inflows, while rising inflation and oil prices may force 50-75 bps rate hikes in coming months.

articles.title: Fuel stocks look secure into August as price hike eases
articles.description: The nation's fuel reserves are flush as petrol prices at the bowser continue to drop, but motorists could be in for a shock when the excise discount ends.

articles.title: E85 fuel to get Rs 20/litre cheaper as India ramps up ethanol push
